ReferendumTitle: Local Tax Question Southeast School Corporation
ReferendumText: "For the eight (8) calendar years immediately following the holding of the referendum, shall the Southeast Dubois County School Corporation impose a property tax rate that does not exceed nineteen cents ($0.19) on each one hundred dollars ($100) of assessed valuation and that is in addition to all other property taxes imposed by the school corporation for the purpose of funding course options required for funding academic and educationally-related programs, maintaining class sizes, recruitment/retention of teachers and support staff, and school safety/mental health resources?"

ReferendumTitle: Reorganization by Town of Middletown and Fall Creek Township
ReferendumText: The Town of Middletown and Fall Creek Township have each adopted a Plan of Reorganization that provides for the consolidation of Middletown and Fall Creek Township into a single governmental unit that will be governed and administered as a town with a five (5) member elected town council. Shall the town of Middletown and Fall Creek Township reorganize as a single political subdivision?

ReferendumTitle: Wawasee School Corporation Tax Levy Referendum
ReferendumText: For the eight (8) calendar years immediately following the holding of the referendum, shall Wawasee Community School Corporation impose a property tax rate that does not exceed twenty-eight and five tenths cents ($0.285) on each one hundred dollars ($100) of assessed valuation and that is in addition to all other property taxes imposed by the school corporation for the purpose of funding the expansion of safety and security measures, and the retention and expansion of school programming and instruction, including career-and-technical education and adult education?

ReferendumTitle: GARY COMMUNITY SCHOOL CORPORATION PUBLIC QUESTION
ReferendumText: For the eight (8) calendar years immediately following the holding of the referendum, shall the Gary Community School Corporation impose a property tax rate that does not exceed fifty six and twenty hundredths cents ($0.5620) on each one hundred dollars ($100) of assessed valuation and that is in addition to all other property taxes imposed by the school corporation for the purpose of funding teachers, instructional staff, student preschool, athletics and extracurricular activities, student safety and assisting with balancing the budget?

ReferendumTitle: Public Question
ReferendumText: "For the eight (8) calendar years immediately following the holding of the referendum, shall the Bremen Public Schools impose a property tax rate that does not exceed six cents ($0.06) on each one hundred dollars ($100) of assessed valuation and that is in addition to all other property taxes imposed by the school corporation for the purpose of funding student health services including an additional nurse and student mental health support?"
